title: oreotelia montana
intro: Oreotelia montana, also known as the Mountain Oreotelia, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Phrymaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including iridoids and phenylethanoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Oreotelia montana is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and promoting overall well-being.
